message:
refactor(cli): unify file type detection across commands

Consolidate duplicated file format detection logic from cli.zig,
transform.zig, and enrich.zig into shared file_detect.zig module.

- Add unified FileType enum with all supported formats
- Add Magic constants for binary format signatures
- Add detect(), detectFromPath(), detectFromData() helpers
- Add isDeltaDirectory(), isIcebergDirectory() for lakehouse formats
- Remove ~120 lines of duplicated code across 3 files
